headline: North Rock Real Estate invested $8.98M to buy a Rochester commercial center
summary: Jun. 20—ROCHESTER — North Rock Real Estate and a group of investors recently paid $8.98 million for the Rochester Crossings commercial center in northwest Rochester. Under the corporate name of Rochester Crossings LLC, the group purchased the 23-year-old center at 3780 Marketplace Drive NW, on June 11. Olmsted County estimated the total market value of the property at $7.12 million for ...
